headline: Assessing Lam Research (LRCX) Valuation After AI Infrastructure Momentum And Analyst Upgrades
summary: Lam Research (LRCX) is back in focus after a string of upbeat earnings results, stronger demand across semiconductor end markets, and supportive analyst commentary related to AI infrastructure and global foundry expansion. See our latest analysis for Lam Research. The recent 2.63% 1 day share price return, on top of a 58.89% year to date share price return and a very large 1 year total shareholder return, suggests momentum has been building as investors respond to strong results, rising AI...
